item.title: 布伦特原油期货下跌逾7%
item.description: 布伦特原油周二下跌逾7%，此前美国总统特朗普暗示中东战争可能即将结束，缓解了市场对全球石油供应长期中断的担忧。【原文：Brent crude fell more ​than 7% ‌on Tuesday after U.S. President ​Donald Trump ​hinted that the ⁠war in ​the Middle East could ​end soon, easing concerns about prolonged ​disruptions to ​global oil supplies.】

item.title: 德国出版商拒绝苹果修订后的应用追踪规则，呼吁对其处以反垄断罚款
item.description: 德国出版商和广告商协会周二表示，苹果公司拟议的追踪规则变更未能解决移动广告市场的反垄断问题，并敦促该国反垄断机构对这家美国科技巨头处以罚款。【原文：Apple's proposed changes to its app tracking rules do not resolve antitrust issues in the mobile advertising market, associations representing German publishers ​and advertisers said on Tuesday as they urged the country's antitrust ‌authority to slap a fine on the U.S. tech giant.】

item.title: 消息人士称高盛推出对冲基金产品押注企业贷款下跌
item.description: 据知情人士透露，华尔街投资银行巨头高盛正向对冲基金推介一款金融产品，该产品允许对冲基金对企业贷款进行做空或做多操作。【原文：Wall Street investment banking giant Goldman Sachs is pitching ‌hedge funds a financial product that allows them to take a short or long position on corporate loans, a source familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 加拿大表示将允许TikTok继续在该国运营
item.description: 加拿大政府周一表示，在完成国家安全审查后，将允许TikTok继续在加拿大运营，并批准该科技平台的投资计划。【原文：The Canadian government said on Monday that it will let TikTok continue to operate ​in Canada and allow an investment by the tech platform to ‌proceed after completing a national security review.】

item.title: 路透社/益普索民调显示，美国民众预期伊朗遭袭后汽油价格将持续上涨
item.description: 路透社/益普索民调显示，多数美国人认为在特朗普总统决定对伊朗发动军事打击后，未来数月汽油价格将上涨，且许多人预期冲突将长期持续。该民调于周一结束。【原文：Most Americans think gasoline prices are ​going to rise in coming months following President Donald Trump's decision to launch military strikes on Iran, and ‌many expect a protracted conflict, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll that closed on Monday.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，私募股权公司EQT正考虑以60亿美元出售Linux先驱SUSE
item.description: 据两位知情人士透露，私募股权公司EQT AB正考虑出售开源软件公司SUSE，该交易估值可能高达60亿美元（51亿欧元）。【原文：Private equity firm EQT AB is exploring a sale of open-source software company SUSE in a deal that could value it up ​to $6 billion (5.1 billion euros), according to two people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 特朗普表示美国将豁免部分石油相关制裁以确保供应
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周一表示，美国将豁免某些石油相关制裁，以确保充足的石油供应并降低油价。【原文：President Donald Trump ​said on Monday that the ‌United States is waiving certain oil-related sanctions as a way to ensure ​adequate oil supply and lower ​prices.】

item.title: 麦迪逊空气解决方案公司披露美国IPO申报文件显示营收激增
item.description: 麦迪逊空气解决方案公司周一披露其2025年营收激增，这家暖通空调企业已公开其在美国首次公开募股的申请文件。【原文：Madison Air Solutions on Monday disclosed a surge in its 2025 revenue ​as the heating, ventilation and air conditioning company made public paperwork ‌for its U.S. initial public offering.】

item.title: 贝塔科技加速军用货运无人机研发进程，获美国联邦航空管理局拨款
item.description: 无人机初创企业Beta Technologies正将Alia MV250军用运输无人机的发展进程提前六个月，首飞预计将于今年实现。该公司首席执行官凯尔·克拉克在接受路透社采访时透露了这一消息。【原文：Drone startup Beta Technologies is speeding ‌up development of its Alia MV250 military cargo drone by six months, with the first flight now expected this year, Beta chief executive Kyle Clark told Reuters in an interview.】

item.title: 美联储主席鲍威尔在司法部披露调查后的一周内与美国议员进行了13次通话
item.description: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的日程表显示，在1月11日披露司法部对其国会证词展开调查后的一周内，他与美国国会议员进行了密集通话。【原文：Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell had a flurry of calls with U.S. lawmakers in the week following his January 11 disclosure of a Department of ​Justice investigation into his statements to Congress, his calendar shows.】

item.title: JBS工人将在美国牛肉加工厂罢工，消费者面临创纪录价格
item.description: 科罗拉多州格里利市约3800名JBS肉类加工厂工人计划于3月16日开始罢工，工会周一宣布。此举将使这家美国最大牛肉加工厂之一陷入停产，而消费者正面临创纪录的高肉价。【原文：About 3,800 JBS meatpacking workers in Greeley, Colorado, plan to go on strike starting on March 16, the workers' union said on Monday, crippling production at one ​of the largest U.S. beef plants as consumers face record-high prices.】

item.title: 交易日华尔街因战争决议希望强势反弹
item.description: 亚洲和欧洲股市周一暴跌，伊朗战争进入第二周之际，油价飙升至每桶100美元以上，涨幅高达30%。但随后华尔街股市反弹，油价回落，因特朗普总统暗示这场战争可能即将结束。【原文：Stocks in Asia and Europe tumbled on Monday as the Iran war entered its second week and oil prices surged as much as 30% above $100 a barrel. But Wall Street rallied and oil later sank after President Donald Trump indicated the war may soon be over.】

item.title: 美国能源部长称美国正考虑出售战略石油储备
item.description: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特周一表示，随着伊朗战争期间油价飙升，美国正考虑协调美国战略石油储备的石油销售与其他国家的石油释放。【原文：The U.S. is considering coordinating ​sales of oil from the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve with ‌releases from other countries as prices soar during the war on Iran, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said on Monday.】

item.title: 小企业对特朗普最新全球关税发起法律挑战
item.description: 周一，两家小型企业就特朗普政府最新一轮关税政策提起诉讼，称在最高法院推翻政府先前关税措施后，总统不能仅凭另一项法律就重新对进口商品征收10%的全球性关税。【原文：Two small businesses on Monday sued the Trump administration over its latest round of tariffs, ​saying that the president cannot simply use a different law ‌to reimpose a global 10-percent tax on imported goods after the U.S. Supreme Court struck down the administration’s previous tariffs.】

item.title: 蓝天公司首席执行官杰伊·格雷伯卸任，顾问托尼·施耐德被任命为临时首席执行官。
item.description: 杰伊·格拉伯将卸任Bluesky首席执行官一职，转任该社交媒体平台的首席创新官。【原文：Jay Graber is stepping down as the CEO of Bluesky and will transition ​to the role of chief innovation officer ‌at the social media platform.】

item.title: 解读：Anthropic公司对政府的诉讼：这家人工智能公司如何描述事件经过
item.description: 周一，人工智能公司Anthropic起诉美国政府，将这场争议升级为该公司所称的报复行为——因其拒绝解除对Claude模型的安全限制而遭报复。【原文：Anthropic sued the U.S. government on Monday, escalating a dispute the AI company frames as retaliation for refusing to remove safety limits on its Claude model.】

item.title: 诉讼质疑美国禁止社交媒体研究人员签证的政策
item.description: 一群科技研究人员周一提起诉讼，指控美国总统唐纳德·特朗普政府采取了一项违宪政策，该政策针对研究社交媒体虚假信息和仇恨言论的外国公民，对其实施拒签和驱逐出境。【原文：A group of technology researchers filed a lawsuit on Monday alleging that ​U.S. President Donald Trump's administration has adopted an unconstitutional policy that targets foreign nationals who study ‌disinformation and hate speech on social media for visa denials and deportation.】

item.title: 美国参议员敦促劳工统计局分析中东冲突对通胀的影响
item.description: 美国民主党参议员爱德华·马基周一要求劳工统计局就中东冲突可能引发的通胀影响进行全面分析并公布报告。该冲突已导致油价飙升。【原文：Democratic U.S. Senator Edward Markey on Monday asked the Bureau of Labor Statistics to ​produce and publish a comprehensive analysis of the ‌likely impact on inflation from the Middle East conflict, which has caused a surge in oil prices.】

item.title: 巴西农民面临柴油成本飙升，中东冲突推高油价
item.description: 柴油价格的飙升正成为美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击后，对巴西农业部门构成的首要且最直接的威胁。这使得生产者在收获创纪录的大豆作物并播种玉米时成本激增——而玉米播种已不容延误。【原文：A spike in diesel prices is emerging as the first and most immediate threat to Brazil's farm sector from the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran, raising costs for producers ​harvesting a record soybean crop and planting corn they cannot afford to delay.】

item.title: 惠普企业公司预测收入将因人工智能热潮超出预期
item.description: 惠普企业公司周一预测第二季度营收将超出华尔街预期，押注其搭载英伟达芯片的人工智能服务器需求将持续增长。【原文：Hewlett Packard Enterprise forecast second-quarter revenue above Wall ​Street estimates on Monday, betting on growing demand for ‌its artificial intelligence-powered servers that are equipped with Nvidia's chips.】

item.title: 新西兰航空因中东冲突导致航空燃油价格飙升，暂停发布2026财年业绩预测
item.description: 新西兰航空周二暂停了2026财年盈利预测，称近期中东冲突升级以及全球航空燃油市场出现前所未有的波动是主要原因。【原文：Air New Zealand suspended ​its fiscal 2026 earnings forecast ‌on Tuesday, citing the recent escalation of conflict in the Middle East and ​unprecedented volatility in global jet ​fuel markets.】

item.title: 油价飙升引发美国股市投资者担忧
item.description: 油价飙升至每桶100美元以上，令美国股市投资者感到不安。他们正为能源价格可能进一步大幅上涨而做准备，这可能使经济陷入困境，并进一步损害股市。【原文：A stunning surge in oil prices above $100 a barrel is rattling U.S. stock investors, as they brace for an even sharper rise in energy prices that could stagger the economy and further damage equities.】

item.title: 伊朗战争推高油价，但石油巨头股价却停滞不前
item.description: 周一油价攀升至2022年以来的最高水平，但自上月底美以对伊战争爆发以来，壳牌和埃克森美孚等主要生产商的股价涨幅有限，这表明交易员认为市场波动可能只是短暂现象。【原文：Oil prices on Monday climbed to the highest level since 2022, but shares of major producers like Shell ​and Exxon Mobil have so far seen limited gains since the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran broke out late last month, ‌suggesting that traders think the pain in the market may be short term.】

item.title: 特朗普将如何应对油价飙升？
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普预计最早将于周一审议一系列平抑油价的方案。由于美国与以色列对伊朗的战争不断升级，油价已飙升至2022年以来的最高水平。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to review as early as Monday a set of options to tame oil prices, which have soared to the highest level since 2022 because of the expanding U.S.-Israel war with Iran.】

item.title: 人类公司起诉特朗普全面禁止其技术应用的关键诉求
item.description: 人类智能公司周一提起诉讼，试图阻止五角大楼将其列入国家安全黑名单，这使得该人工智能实验室与美军围绕其技术使用限制展开的高风险博弈进一步升级。【原文：Anthropic filed a lawsuit on Monday to block the Pentagon from placing it on a national security blacklist, escalating the artificial intelligence lab's high-stakes battle with ​the U.S. military over usage restrictions on its technology.】

item.title: 中东局势动荡之际，Venture Global承诺按时交付液化天然气
item.description: 据路透社获得的一封信函显示，美国液化天然气开发商Venture Global LNG已告知其路易斯安那州普拉克明斯出口工厂的客户，该工厂将按原定计划交付合同货物，并维持已商定的价格。【原文：U.S. liquefied natural gas developer Venture ‌Global LNG has told customers of its Plaquemines export plant under development in Louisiana that it will start delivering contracted cargoes on schedule and at the already-agreed-upon prices, according to a letter seen by Reuters.】

item.title: 欧洲陷入困境的零售业似乎对新一轮能源价格冲击准备不足
item.description: 自美以对伊朗开战以来，能源价格的飙升给欧洲零售业带来了更大压力，该行业本已因消费者需求疲软和购买力下降而举步维艰。【原文：A surge in ​energy prices since the start of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran piles further pressure on the retail sector ‌in Europe, already struggling with weak consumer demand and diminished spending power.】

item.title: 普京称能源危机已然来临，但俄罗斯已做好与欧洲合作的准备
item.description: 俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京周一表示，美以对伊朗的战争已引发全球能源危机，并警告称依赖霍尔木兹海峡运输的石油生产可能很快停滞。【原文：Russian President Vladimir Putin said on Monday that the U.S.-Israeli war ‌on Iran had triggered a global energy crisis and cautioned that oil production dependent on transport through the Strait of Hormuz could soon come to a halt.】

item.title: 芝加哥期权交易所将推出超越二元投注的预测市场合约，提供部分赔付
item.description: 衍生品和证券交易所运营商Cboe周一宣布，计划推出预测市场合约，根据交易者预测的准确性提供部分赔付，突破了传统全有或全无的模式。【原文：Derivatives and securities exchange operator Cboe said on Monday it plans to launch prediction ​market contracts offering partial payouts based ‌on the accuracy of traders' predictions, moving beyond the traditional all-or-nothing format.】

item.title: 回到1970年代？投资者为滞胀回归做准备
item.description: 投资者如今正认真考虑中东战争可能引发滞胀冲击的可能性——正如五十年前那样，当时全球能源供应中断导致通胀飙升，经济增长遭受重创。【原文：Investors are now seriously considering the possibility that war in the Middle East could create a stagflationary shock, just as it did 50 years ago, when disruption to global ​energy supplies sent inflation surging, and battered growth】
